tests_added.edge_case: Single newline (\n) in primary_text survives roundtrip

Triple newline (


) section gap survives roundtrip

tests_added.edge_case: 3+ paragraph scholarly text with multiple \n\n survives roundtrip

tests_added.edge_case: Trailing newline at end of text preserved

tests_added.edge_case: Leading newline at start of text preserved

tests_added.name: test_newlines_in_jsonl_structure
tests_added.edge_case: Newlines inside primary_text do NOT break JSONL line structure (structural integrity)

tests_added.name: test_carriage_return_preserved
tests_added.edge_case: CR (\r) and CRLF (\r\n) from OCR sources survive roundtrip

tests_added.name: test_decomposed_hamza_above_preserved
tests_added.edge_case: NFC guard: decomposed alef+hamza above (U+0627 U+0654) NOT composed to U+0623

tests_added.name: test_decomposed_hamza_below_preserved
tests_added.edge_case: NFC guard: decomposed alef+hamza below (U+0627 U+0655) NOT composed to U+0625

tests_added.name: test_decomposed_alef_maddah_preserved
tests_added.edge_case: NFC guard: decomposed alef+maddah (U+0627 U+0653) NOT composed to U+0622

tests_added.name: test_mixed_composed_and_decomposed
tests_added.edge_case: NFC guard: mixed composed (U+0623) and decomposed (U+0627+U+0654) preserved distinctly

learnings: writer.py serialization path (model_dump → json.dumps → UTF-8 file → json.loads) preserves ALL Arabic text byte-for-byte including diacritics, ZWNJ, tatweel, superscript alef, and paragraph breaks
json.dumps correctly escapes \n inside string values to \\n in JSONL output, preserving line structure
No NFC normalization occurs anywhere in the Pydantic + json serialization chain — decomposed Arabic forms survive intact
Windows CRLF (\r\n) in primary_text survives roundtrip through json.dumps/loads despite Windows text-mode I/O
ensure_ascii=False in json.dumps is critical — without it, all Arabic characters would be \uXXXX-escaped
